name: Kreuzwort++
short_description: Kreuzwort++ is a crossword puzzle app with over 5000 exciting puzzle grids for endless puzzle fun. Find the right words, solve tricky questions and improve your word knowledge. How many puzzles can you solve?
detailed_description:
WARNING: Kreuzwort++ is only available in German at this point in time.

Do you love solving tricky puzzles? Then Kreuzwort++ is just the thing for you!

Take on over 5000 crossword puzzles, find the right words and improve your word knowledge. Whether in between or for hours on end - you set the pace. Are you ready to put your puzzle skills to the test?

Key features

  • Endless puzzle fun with over 5000 exciting crossword puzzles.
  • Puzzle day and night – with the integrated dark mode!
  • For in-between or for hours on end – your progress is always saved.
  • Play in flexible window or full screen mode.
